title: apios frutescens
intro: Apios frutescens, also known as the potato bean or wild potato, is a perennial vine native to eastern North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Apios frutescens are numerous, and it has been found to help lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve digestion. Apios frutescens can be prepared in various herbal forms, including dried root, root powder, and tea, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
